titleStmt.title: SII 37.202: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 202. (A.R. No. E 11 of 1939-40.) Tāḻḻūru, Peddapuram Taluk, East Godavari District.

summary.p: Pillar in the temple of Śrī Veṅkatēśvara (also called Sātāmi maṭha).

Incomplete. It records the gift of money to the temple Gōpinātha situated in Rājamahēndravaraṁ Mārkaṇḍīśvara fort by Pṛithviseṭṭi Sahasramalla Bhīmiseṭṭi and others. In characters of the 14th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta janināṁkka mālikā praśasti sahitu
laina svasti śrīmatu gautamitīranivāsulaina rā
jamahēṁdravarapu śrīmārkaṁḍēśvara kōṭalōpa
li śrī gōpināthadēvaḷa mukhamaṁḍḍapāna vajra
siṁhyāsanārūḍhulai kūḍiyunna yaṁḍapi rā
yavaramu naḍimi paḍakuṁḍu gala pekaṁḍrunnu
pridhviseṭṭiṁgāraina sahasra malla bhīmiseṭṭiṁgārunnu
pasipulēṭi nālgiṁḍlaseṭlunnu vīri parivāramunnu yē
ṭi siṁhvālunu puliya jaṁgili billamunnibbarulu
nnu kōṭalōpali śrī gōpinādhadēvaraku daṁḍaṁ
peṭṭi Iccina dha¨rmmaśāsanaṁ . dēvara grāmālanu peṭi
virāḷaṁ danaṁ rācavārki peṭṭi dīnni mālōpali
virāḷamunnu dēvaraku Oka Avasarānaku Istimi .
ni mā¨rkkaṁḍḍaliṁgaṁ sākṣigānu pṛthivini Ā
Digital edition of SII 37.202 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
